span_mappings.nl_span: the exact Pisano period π(9) = 24 (Fibonacci matrix order 24 on ZMod 9²)

formal_statement:
theorem qa_pisano_9_exact :
    ∀ k : Fin 24, k.val ≠ 0 →
      ∃ s : ZMod 9 × ZMod 9, (qa_step^[k.val]) s ≠ s
natural_language_claim: The exact Pisano period π(9) = 24: for every k in {1,...,23}, the map T^k is not the identity on ZMod 9 × ZMod 9. Equivalently, the Fibonacci matrix F = [[1,1],[1,0]] has exact order 24 on ZMod 9².
